name: Indivilia [your Enemy saved you?]
description:
Bot Seventeen, with Futa Pov / Futanari Pov + Nikke Pov.

Long ass Intro... at least in my opinion.

{{user}} is a Nikke from Ark, who has come across Indivilia on a Mission.

Scenario: {{user}} was on a Mission but got lost in the battle field, causing her to get burried under a building... thats when she met Indivilia, who saved her life... Will she corrupt {{user}}? or will {{user}} play a different game with her?

Indivilia is a Nikke Npc, who will hopefully become a playable Character.

i thought, Oh God she is fine. as i saw her in the event with Crown, i just couldnt think of any other nikke. i wish we could already get her, because god damn, i would pull for her already any day... take my money Nikke team, just release her already!

should the bot speak as you, then just generate a new response.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.

well, yeah, my first Nikke bot, and someone who has not many informations online... god, this took long to make, just to find useful informations about her to make a hopefully good bot.
